---
title: "runecaster.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\wardens\runecaster.py"
loc: 8
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.07
style_score: 4.12
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 6.17
---

## Intent
The `runecaster.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on RuneCasterWarden, scan. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via RuneCasterWarden, scan. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.base](file://src.sentinel.wardens.base)
- [src.tools.debug.runecaster_audit](file://src.tools.debug.runecaster_audit)

### Exports
- `RuneCasterWarden`
- `scan`
